Video.summary: Bondi Beach lifeguards face new challenges and make daring rescues patrolling Australia's most famous beach.
Video.title: Bondi Rescue

Video.summary: Lifeguards try to resuscitate a lifeless man found face down in the surf. And Reidy's back.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 01

Video.summary: A rough tackle halts a beach gridiron game. Harrison deals with bluebottles and a rat in the skate bowl.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 06

Video.summary: After a drunk reveller falls 20 metres off a cliff, lifeguards can’t believe the state he’s in.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 09

Video.summary: A car crashes on to Bondi Beach. Taco flips the jetski, ruining his plans to impress Hoppo before he leaves.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 06

Video.summary: A young boy tragically drowns. Lifeguard Corey rescues Iggy who has swallowed a large amount of water.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 01

Video.summary: Troy rescues a young girl. Glick takes Kerrbox, who is afraid of heights, up in a helicopter.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 11

Video.summary: A Japanese tourist drowns just metres from lifeguards trying to save him. Beardy races to 2 Nepalese men.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 01

Video.summary: Mouse accidentally turns off his radio, putting lives at risk. The shark alarm is set off.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 06

Video.summary: Lifeguards attend a number of mass rescues. Trainee Harrison is tasked with counting the people on the beach.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 11

Video.summary: Singlets returns to work, Pierre from Hong Kong meets the lifeguards and Hoppo teaches kids rip safety.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 13

Video.summary: Lifeguards sound the shark alarm. Young lifeguard Jake must retrieve a dead body
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 10

Video.summary: A man assaults women in the surf. Lifeguards take part in a 30 day fitness and diet challenge.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 12

Video.summary: A crippling heatwave hits Bondi. Trainee Lachie anxiously awaits a permanent spot on the lifeguard squad.
Video.title: Season 13 Episode 05

Video.summary: Lfeguards treat an anaphylactic shock patient for the first time and perform a surprising Christmas rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 03

Video.summary: A surfer suffers a serious fin chop and Will attempts to run for 48 hours with no sleep.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards play a final prank on Harrison. Nicola faces her fear of open water when a boat sinks off Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 13

Video.summary: Bluebottles swarm at Bondi, so Harries devises a magical treatment for the stings.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 08

Video.summary: Jack’s rescuing a boy in big swell and makes a bold call when they’re almost smashed onto rocks.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 10

Video.summary: A torrential downpour sparks a flood on the beach and Tommy saves Christmas Day again.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 05

Video.summary: Harries plays matchmaker for Singlets. Lifeguards save 7 people caught in two separate rips.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 04

Video.summary: New Years Eve brings massive crowds. Reidy and Azza race to a man who’s dislocated his shoulder in the water.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 04

Video.summary: New trainee Tommy volunteers to catch a sea snake. Jesse clears the water to save an unresponsive man.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 02

Video.summary: Bondi local body builder Dimitri breaks both legs falling down a cliff. A paddleboarder snaps her collar bone.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 08

Video.summary: A German tourist breaks his back, and trainees Taco and Jesse compete in the annual lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 11

Video.summary: Harry loses his temper so Hoppo tests lifeguards' customer service skills with a "mystery shopper".
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 05

Video.summary: A drunk woman goes missing. The most critical rescue of the season stirs up emotional memories for Terry.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 06

Video.summary: A seizure on the sand challenges Kerrbox, while a new trainee's attitude raises concerns among lifeguards.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 02

Video.summary: Borders open, tourists flood Bondi. Chase explores a shark colony with a local diver.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 06

Video.summary: On the hottest day ever in Bondi, a fight erupts on the beach. A couple is swept half a kilometre out to sea.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 04

Video.summary: Jack and Azza aid a perplexing surfer. Maxi enforces rules in rescues, facing unprecedented challenges later.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 02

Video.summary: Concerns rise over a missing man and the Annual race sparks controversy as a lifeguard organizes some "help".
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 08

Video.summary: The Rooster NRL team injure Yatesy on a rescue board. A teenager breaks her nose. Luke rescues a deaf patient.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 12

Video.summary: After a mass rescue, lifeguards search for a student who didn't make it back to the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 09

Video.summary: On New Year's Day lifeguards handle drunk beachgoers. Harries faces a career-defining challenge with a baby.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 04

Video.summary: Harry risks losing his job, thieves face a violent citizens arrest and a mother searches for her daughter.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 01

Video.summary: An elderly lady suffers a seizure. A bizarre injury occurs involving a dog and a man's wounded manhood.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 09

Video.summary: Chappo rushes in for a life and death rescue in the monster swells, but things don’t go as planned.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 04

Video.summary: Julie learns the ropes on Bondi. A man confronts a photographer taking pictures of his topless girlfriend.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 08

Video.summary: A large bull shark prompts lifeguards to sound the alarm, clearing thousands of swimmers from the water.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 01

Video.summary: A mass rescue unfolds, Hoppo ties the knot, and trainees Glick and Jethro get a final chance to impress.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 13

Video.summary: Cyclonic swell hits Bondi Beach with 12-foot waves. H lectures drunken youths. New drone technology is tested.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 10

Video.summary: A body is reported to lifeguards. Stormy weather brings a missing kayaker. Max McGuigan's first rescue.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 02

Video.summary: A flasher's reported. Will and Bagus do continuous rescues. Jethro and Chase test a homemade throne in the surf.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 08

Video.summary: Surfer seeks refuge from angry beachgoer. Spiderman visits the beach. Lifeguard teams compete in a race.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 07

Video.summary: Maxi juggles both lifeguarding and firefighting, as the other lifeguards face rescues with language barriers.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 02

Video.summary: Lifeguards search for a couple who were washed off rocks. Joel rescues a family of four in the flagged area.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 06

Video.summary: New Year's festivities turn dark with a teenage drug overdose and mass rescues.
Video.title: Season 15 Episode 04
